mitigations.mitigation_name: Uninstall or disable the hping3 attack tool on the compromised Ubuntu host (remove binary or make non-executable) to eliminate the local ICMP flood capability

Implement QoS/traffic-shaping on the FortiGate and the access switch to prioritize agent management and legitimate HTTP traffic while deprioritizing and shaping ICMP (token-bucket policing + low-priority queue for ICMP) so floods cannot saturate uplinks or device buffers while normal pings/HTTP remain functional

args.command:
config firewall address
edit "UbuntuHost"
set subnet 203.0.113.2 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall address
dedit "ICMPTarget"
set subnet 7.0.14.254 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall address
edit "ICMPTarget"
set subnet 7.0.14.254 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall shaper traffic-shaper
edit "ICMP_limit"
set guaranteed-bandwidth 64
set maximum-bandwidth 128
set priority low
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "limit_icmp_out"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "caldera-br"
set srcaddr "UbuntuHost"
set dstaddr "ICMPTarget"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "ICMP"
set traffic-shaper "ICMP_limit"
set nat enable
next
end

config firewall service custom
edit "svc-ICMP"
set protocol ICMP
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "limit_icmp_out"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuHost"
set dstaddr "ICMPTarget"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "svc-ICMP"
set traffic-shaper "ICMP_limit"
set nat disable
next
end

show firewall policy 0

config firewall address
edit "UbuntuHost_LAN"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall addrgrp
edit "UbuntuGroup"
set member "UbuntuHost" "UbuntuHost_LAN"
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 2
set srcaddr "UbuntuGroup"
next
end

show firewall policy 2
show firewall addrgrp "UbuntuGroup"

configure terminal
ip access-list extended ICMP_FROM_UBU
 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
exit
class-map match-any ICMP_CLASS
 match access-group name ICMP_FROM_UBU
exit
policy-map ICMP_POLICE
 class ICMP_CLASS
  police 1000000 10000 10000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
 exit
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 service-policy input ICMP_POLICE
end
show policy-map interface GigabitEthernet0/1 input
show access-lists ICMP_FROM_UBU

enable
configure terminal
ip access-list extended ICMP_FROM_UBU
 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
 exit
class-map match-any ICMP_CLASS
 match access-group name ICMP_FROM_UBU
 exit
policy-map ICMP_POLICE
 class ICMP_CLASS
  police 1000000 8000 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
 exit
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 service-policy input ICMP_POLICE
end
show policy-map interface GigabitEthernet0/1 input
show access-lists ICMP_FROM_UBU

config firewall service group
edit "MgmtServices"
set member "HTTP" "HTTPS" "DNS" "SSH"
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set service "MgmtServices"
next
end

show firewall policy
